title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Birlasoft

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Birlasoft
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Birlasoft:
Birlasoft is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft!
